errors.name: empty-string
errors.note: not shaped like a code at all

errors.name: prefix-no-hyphen
errors.note: prefix must end with a hyphen

errors.name: prefix-wrong-tag
errors.note: tag must be IDLE

errors.name: prefix-non-numeric-version
errors.note: version must be a decimal integer

errors.name: prefix-leading-zero-version
errors.note: leading-zero version violates the prefix grammar (no leading zeros) — never parsed as v1, even around a valid v1 body

errors.name: prefix-leading-zero-version-multi-digit
errors.note: leading zero ahead of a multi-digit version — never zero-stripped into version 10

errors.name: empty-body
errors.note: body must be non-empty

errors.name: illegal-char-U
errors.note: U is outside the Crockford alphabet — never folded

errors.name: illegal-junk-chars
errors.note: symbols outside the alphabet are malformed

errors.name: body-too-short
errors.note: body must decode to >= flags + 1 id byte + 2 checksum bytes

errors.name: non-canonical-padding
errors.note: trailing padding bits must be zero — one canonical spelling per payload

errors.name: unknown-version-0
errors.note: version 0 is not v1 — rejected before body parsing

errors.name: unknown-version-2
errors.note: future versions fail loud, never misparse

errors.name: unknown-version-42
errors.note: any version other than 1

errors.name: checksum-tampered-payload
errors.note: payload edited, checksum now disagrees

errors.name: checksum-tampered-checksum
errors.note: checksum bytes edited

errors.name: unknown-flag-bit-3
errors.note: flags bit 3 is undefined in v1 (valid checksum)

errors.name: unknown-flag-bit-7
errors.note: flags bit 7 is undefined in v1 (valid checksum)

errors.name: theme-id-uppercase
errors.note: payload theme id must be a lowercase slug (valid checksum)

errors.name: theme-id-double-hyphen
errors.note: single hyphens only between slug words

errors.name: theme-id-leading-hyphen
errors.note: slug cannot start with a hyphen

errors.name: theme-id-trailing-hyphen
errors.note: slug cannot end with a hyphen

errors.name: theme-id-underscore
errors.note: underscore is outside the slug charset

errors.name: theme-id-too-long
errors.note: slug max length is 32

errors.name: theme-id-non-ascii
errors.note: payload theme id must be ASCII
